plugin.deviceremote.tab.hint: Configure the remote server in plugin settings, then select a device in the Devices list and use Remote control from the plugin menu.
plugin.deviceremote.modal.title: Remote control
plugin.deviceremote.modal.hint: After starting, open the viewer in a new browser tab. The device agent starts automatically when online.
plugin.deviceremote.settings.hint: Use the Headwind Remote (aPuppet) web-admin URL, e.g. https://remote.example.com/web-admin/
